metadata.description: HawkPR — plugin for digital PR workflows, powered by the HawkPR toolkit.

plugins.name: hawkpr
plugins.description: HawkPR digital PR toolkit: a consolidated set of DPR skills. Track third-party news coverage of a pitched press release end to end — create a campaign, run the hunt, confirm the tracked queries, preview the alert email, and get a shareable URL. More tools to come. No web UI required.
